text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking down the hallway, I
hear a loud voice coming from a classroom...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Dober! Your race today was awfully impressive!
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The way ya ran that final stretch was somethin'
else! Ya had me mesmerized, the way ya cut
through the pack like a hot knife through butter!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, show me a smile! You keep gettin' all
quiet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
W-well, you have to give me a heads-up before
starting the compliments...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause I'm your fan, duh! You're never gonna
get better at takin' a compliment if I warn ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I get a compliment, I show 'em a big ol'
smile 'cause I'm awful happy! Don'tcha like bein'
complimented?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I dislike it, but the thought of being
watched so closely is a little disconcerting...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't even think... I'm worthy of praise to begin
with—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hmm? Hmmmm?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Forget what I just said. I just need to practice
mo—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm pickin' up what you're puttin' down! So
what you're sayin' is that you're not used to 'em!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-why is that your conclusion?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I can help ya with that, piece of cake! I just gotta
pile on the praise!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Rely on those guts of yours and build up a
tolerance! Yeehaw! Time to get trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're as reliable as the sunrise, Dober! Not just
that, but you're awfully kind and cool to boot!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're cute as a button when ya snack on
parfaits! And your hair's so silky and beautiful I
could just die!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's too much in one go! There's no way I can
handle all of that!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey! We're still just gettin' started!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Stop! Get back here!
